name: PSP Projects Limited
summary: PSP Projects Limited, a construction company, provides construction services for industrial, institutional, residential, social infrastructure, and commercial projects in India. The company constructs industrial buildings for pharmaceutical plants, food processing units, engineering units, and manufacturing and processing facilities; and buildings for hospitals and healthcare services, educational institutes, malls, hospitality services, and corporate offices. It also undertakes government projects and government residential projects; and constructs buildings for group housing and townships, as well as independent residences for select private customers. PSP Projects Limited was founded in 2008 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
